Patient Name: Jane A. Carter
MRN: A1042283
DOB: 03/14/1978
Date of Service: 07/18/2026

Chief Complaint: Chest pain for two days
History of Present Illness: 48-year-old presents with intermittent substernal chest pain on exertion.
Assessment: Likely stable angina; rule out acute coronary syndrome
Plan: Start aspirin, order stress test, follow up in one week

Patient Name: Robert Lin
MRN: L7781920
Specimen: Whole blood

Complete Blood Count result
Hemoglobin: 13.5 g/dL (reference range 13.0-17.0)
WBC: 6.2 10^3/uL (reference range 4.0-11.0)
Platelets: 240 10^3/uL
Glucose: 98 mg/dL

Patient Name: Maria Gonzalez
MRN: D5567341
Admission Date: 07/10/2026
Discharge Date: 07/15/2026
Hospital Course: Admitted for community-acquired pneumonia, treated with IV antibiotics.
Discharge Diagnosis: Community-acquired pneumonia, resolving
Disposition: Discharged home with a course of oral antibiotics

Patient Name: Daniel O'Brien
MRN: R2290145
Referred To: Cardiology
Reason for Referral: Evaluation of new-onset atrial fibrillation
Consult requested for rhythm management and anticoagulation planning.

Patient Name: Aisha Khan
MRN: A9981123
DOB: 11/02/1990
CC: Shortness of breath on exertion
Assessment: Suspected exercise-induced asthma
Plan: Prescribe albuterol inhaler and order spirometry

Meeting Notes: Q3 logistics sync
The team reviewed warehouse throughput and shipping SLAs for the coming quarter.
Action items were assigned for inventory reconciliation and carrier renegotiation.
